'''Mabonte''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Geonosis system/Legends|Geonosis system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a pair of [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="GatORW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
